creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
The online manpages for sshd and sshd_config are outdated and refer to versions that don't support e.g. ChrootDirectory directives

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=sshd&apropos=0&sektion=0&manpath=FreeBSD+7.1-RELEASE+and+Ports&format=html

version tag in last line is
FreeBSD 7.0		      September 25, 1999		   FreeBSD 7.0

Fix: 

rebuild online man-pages
How-To-Repeat: navigate to http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi
"Man Page or Keyword Search" sshd_config
"FreeBSD 7.1-RELEASE"

compare output with 'man sshd_config' from a FreeBSD-7.1 system (check for ChrootDirectory directive)
